Graceful-shutdown ordering (8-step drain umbrella)
Step 1 — Orchestrator stops pulling new tasks from the queue
Step 2 — In-flight runs reach next checkpoint, then suspend
Step 3 — Agent runners wait for handler subprocesses to complete
Step 3a — `br`-CLI adapter intent-log drain
Step 4 — Event bus flushes pending events (fsync)
Step 5 — Memory layer flushes indexing
Step 6 — Workspace manager unlocks leased workspaces
Step 7 — Orchestrator exits (or enters `paused`)
